title: Skebob
description: Little creature hiding in jungle, can you find him?
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c4241dfa063f230f7b67c79b3bc8df4ad50ede1_0.webp)

---

## This mod add a new mob Skebob This is jumpy little creature that you сan rarely find in jungle biome. - Can be bred using cocoa beans - On death drop **Skebob Meat** and rarely can drop **Skebob Beak** ![skebob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f5e95595aed14a163fe182c671dcd01a154bcba.png) ## New item - Beak Mask Can be crafted using **Skebob Beak** and **String** when equiped replace default sound when a player is damaged with **skebob sounds.** ![BeakMaskOnPLayer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80535192b7b77f04b95f0b10e5b47b55a305a9a2.png) --- ## Other features - Skebob hair can be dyed in **all** possible colors. - New structure - **Skebob Nest** that can be found in jungle with 2-3 skebobs inside the nest. - New **Dry Tree** can be obtained by smelting any log or wood block on campfire, can be found in the nests. - You can also craft classic wood set from **Dry Tree.**
